diagnosis.root_cause: Database connection pool exhausted by a spike in concurrent requests
reasoning: db.latency_ms jumped to 5000 during the window
pool active/size = 10/10 (100% utilization) with 3 connections waiting
SQLITE_BUSY errors in application logs coincide with the wait queue growing
requests_per_minute = 210 is a spike vs the ~40 baseline
no deploy in the window (last deploy 1.2.1 at 09:05) — rules out a code regression
cpu 45% / disk 60% / tailscale connected — rules out resource and VPN causes

alternative_hypotheses.why_less_likely: no slow-query warnings in logs; latency is from pool waiting, not query time

impact.business_impact: Consulta e cadastro de funcionarios/EPIs lentos durante o pico de trabalho

actions.action: Increase database connection pool from 10 to 20
actions.estimated_impact: Resolves ~80% of timeout errors; latency normalizes in <1min
actions.risks: +10MB RAM; none if rollback is quick

actions.action: Review slow-query and request-rate logs to size the pool permanently
actions.estimated_impact: Prevents recurrence; may reveal an N+1 or missing index
actions.implementation: Inspect logs for the window; correlate pool waits with endpoints

metadata.note: Hand-authored golden output — illustrative similar_incidents (no history store yet).
